---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or architectural idea for this project.
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Proposal
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...").

## Desired Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the proposed modules, APIs, or components.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, visual wireframes, or references about the feature request here.
